anchor.note: CONFIRMED in Bitcoin. COMMITMENT.txt.ots was upgraded on 2026-07-09 from the calendar servers to two completed BitcoinBlockHeaderAttestations (block heights above); attested merkle paths cross-checked against a public block explorer. Verify offline with any OTS verifier (opentimestamps.org, or 'ots verify') against Bitcoin block headers — no trust in the calendars needed. 'calendars_submitted' are the original SUBMISSION endpoints; the attestation URIs embedded in the .ots differ by design. The pre-upgrade pending .ots (475 bytes) is preserved in git history.

disclosure.note: GENESIS cohort. It was sealed and Bitcoin-anchored on 2026-06-18, 7 days after its asof label (the public-ledger infrastructure was built that day). The cryptographic proof-of-existence date is the ANCHOR date (2026-06-18), NOT asof (2026-06-11). For these 7 days the realized outcomes were already observable, so this first cohort carries an information-leakage window and MUST be given near-zero calibration weight. Every subsequent cohort is sealed within ~1 day of its asof (sealed_anchor_gap_days about 0), so its proof is tight. See README 'Trust model'.
